message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant server
database user

User -> server : **1** POST /sign-up with body: email and password
server -> user : **2** Check email existence

alt [Email existed]
  user --> server : **3** Error code
  server --> User : **4** Error message
else [Email is new]
  user --> server : **5** Email is available
  server -> server : **6** Hash password
  server -> user : **7** Store email and hashed password
  user --> server : **8** Store complete
  server --> User : **9** Success message
end

@enduml
